idea-plugin.name: Python Doc Links
idea-plugin.description:
Makes file and function references in Python docstrings and line comments Ctrl+Clickable — navigates to the referenced file or function in the editor.

Supported patterns:
  • filename.py — opens the file
  • :py:func:`module.func` — navigates to the function
  • :func:`module.func` — short Sphinx form
  • :py:mod:`module` — opens the module file

Example:
def my_func():
    """
    See also: submodule.py
    Calls :py:func:`submodule.process_submodule_data`.
    """

Developed with AI assistance (Cursor / LLM).
